title: Formatting a Date in Python
scenario: Given a date in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD', generate a Python function that formats this date as 'Day Month, Year'.
constraints: Must be a single function definition

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated function should use the datetime module and be a single function definition.
The generated function should have valid syntax and be free of syntax errors.
The generated function should correctly format the date.
